user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable the alerts module, so that alert functionality becomes available across the HRMS
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Alerts Setup screen; When I set "Do you want to enable the alerts module?" to Yes and Save; Then the alerts module is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to disable the alerts module, so that no alerts are generated when they are not needed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Alerts Setup screen; When I set "Do you want to enable the alerts module?" to No and Save; Then the alerts module is disabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my setup choice and proceed to the next configuration step, so that I can continue configuring alerts in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen whether to enable the alerts module; When I click Save & Next; Then my choice is saved and I advance to the next configuration screen

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel the setup without saving, so that I can discard changes I did not intend to make
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Alerts Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then my changes are discarded and I leave the screen
